09542917152","book_info":{"abstract":"小雷音三藏吟反诗，鹰愁涧白龙传假信？

79208e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323171336426DA23251AC70F72DF3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12745,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14624,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":24701},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1644248291,"author_reply_time":1644248324,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7061375898037682978","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔细致，对洪荒整体的构架构造的非常好，而且作者应该对洪荒类小说有一定的了解，这类题材让人读着会让人觉得有种耳目一新的感觉，觉得真实的西游就应该会是这样，每一个等着唐僧去收服的妖怪就应该都拥有独立的个体，独立的思想，不能一笔盖过，而且作者把每一个妖怪都写出自己的故事，让人看到西游的本质，这点是完美的。好了，我的话说完了，希望作者早日更新，再接再厉，再创辉煌！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644104708,"group_id":"7032302209542917152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"刚刚入行，萌新求罩，感谢各位大佬多多关照！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyu6A7Ml1hwG6W70Ap4CO6s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"97324537995","user_name":"天地有正气"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97324537995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_
